name: Literate Pancake website
description: In this project I created a website for vacation rentals using Amazon S3 for hosting and storage. The website features a user-friendly interface, search functionality, and secure booking system.

name: Home private network
description: In this project I set up a secure and efficient home network, optimizing for both speed and reliability. I configured various network devices and implemented security measures to protect against unauthorized access.

name: Dummee mobile app
description: In this project I re-code a RC card using an arduino and a raspberry pie to be able to control it from a phone app. I also created a website to control the car and added some features like a camera and a gps module to be able to see where the car is and what it sees.

name: Dummee-API
description: This was one of my first programing projects. In this project I attempted to recreate all the coding challenges of the famous Harvard course CS50 in Javascript
